games.name: Grand Theft Auto V

requirements_en.recommended: Recommended:OS: Windows 10 64 Bit, Windows 8.1 64 Bit, Windows 8 64 Bit, Windows 7 64 Bit Service Pack 1Processor: Intel Core i5 3470 @ 3.2GHz (4 CPUs) / AMD X8 FX-8350 @ 4GHz (8 CPUs)Memory: 8 GB RAMGraphics: NVIDIA GTX 660 2GB / AMD HD 7870 2GBStorage: 72 GB available spaceSound Card: 100% DirectX 10 compatibleAdditional Notes:

ratings.title: A World You Can Get Lost In Forever
ratings.comment: A living, breathing world unlike anything else. The three-protagonist structure is genius and the heists are unforgettable. GTA V set the bar for open-world games and nothing has quite matched it since.

ratings.title: Big, Bold, and Worth Every Hour
ratings.comment: Huge, fun, and packed with content. The story takes a while to get going but pays off. Online mode is a game in itself. A must-play for anyone who enjoys open-world games.

ratings.title: Impressive Scale, Shallow Core
ratings.comment: It's impressive in scale but I found the story shallow and the characters hard to like. The constant re-releases feel cynical. A good game that's been overhyped into a great one.

ratings.title: Mean-Spirited and Overrated
ratings.comment: Not for me. The tone is mean-spirited throughout and I found little to care about in the story. The world is big but feels empty once the novelty wears off.

games.description: Grand Theft Auto V is an open-world action-adventure game set in the fictional state of San Andreas, based on Southern California. Players can switch between three protagonists — Michael, Trevor, and Franklin — as they plan and execute heists across the sprawling city of Los Santos. The game features a massive open world filled with activities, side missions, and a thriving online multiplayer mode.

games.name: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt

ratings.title: The Greatest RPG Ever Crafted
ratings.comment: The greatest RPG ever made. The side quests alone are better than the main stories of most games. Geralt is a compelling protagonist and the world of the game feels genuinely lived-in.

ratings.title: A Stunning World Worth Exploring
ratings.comment: A stunning achievement in world-building and storytelling. The combat takes getting used to but the writing more than compensates. Blood and Wine is worth the price alone.

ratings.title: Great World, Frustrating Combat
ratings.comment: Undeniably impressive but I struggled with the combat and the slow opening hours. Once it clicks it's great, but the barrier to entry is higher than people admit.

ratings.title: Too Slow to Hold My Attention
ratings.comment: Too slow and too long for my taste. The combat never felt satisfying and I lost interest before the story hit its stride. Not every great game is for every player.

games.description: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is an action RPG set in a vast open world inspired by Slavic mythology. You play as Geralt of Rivia, a monster hunter for hire, searching for his adopted daughter who is being pursued by a supernatural force. The game is renowned for its deep storytelling, morally complex choices, and an extraordinarily rich world packed with meaningful quests.

games.name: Portal 2

requirements_ru.minimum: Core 2 Duo/Athlon X2 2 ГГц,1 Гб памяти,GeForce 7600/Radeon X800,10 Гб на винчестере,интернет-соединение
requirements_ru.recommended: Core 2 Duo/Athlon X2 2.5 ГГц,2 Гб памяти,GeForce GTX 280/Radeon HD 2600,10 Гб на винчестере,интернет-соединение

ratings.title: Flawless From Start to Finish
ratings.comment: Portal 2 is a perfect game. The puzzles are ingenious, the writing is hilarious, and the co-op mode is one of the best gaming experiences I've ever had. An absolute must-play.

ratings.title: Clever, Funny, and Satisfying
ratings.comment: Wonderfully creative and funny throughout. The puzzle difficulty ramps up at a great pace. GLaDOS and Wheatley are iconic characters. Short but completely satisfying.

ratings.title: Good But Not the Masterpiece
ratings.comment: Good puzzles and sharp writing, but I found the mid-game drag a little. The co-op is fun but requires a patient partner. Worth playing, just not the masterpiece some claim.

ratings.title: Puzzles Are Not For Everyone
ratings.comment: Puzzle games aren't my genre and this didn't convert me. The humor is clever but the gameplay loop grew repetitive quickly. Respect the craft, just not my thing.

games.description: Portal 2 is a first-person puzzle game developed by Valve. Players use a portal gun to create linked doorways through space, solving increasingly complex physics-based puzzles. The game features a single-player campaign with a compelling story and a separate co-op mode where two players must work together. Celebrated for its wit, creativity, and brilliant level design.

games.name: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive

requirements_en.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows® 7/Vista/XP
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom™ X3 8750 processor or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Video card must be 256 MB or more and should be a DirectX 9-compatible with support for Pixel Shader 3.0
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 15 GB available space

requirements_ru.minimum: Сore 2 Duo/Athlon x2 64 1.8 ГГц,2 Гб памяти,GeForce 8800/Radeon X9800,7.6 Гб на винчестере,интернет-соединение
requirements_ru.recommended: Core 2 Duo E6600/Phenom X3 8750,4 Гб памяти,GeForce 480 GTX/Radeon HD 6970,7.6 Гб на винчестере,интернет-соединение

ratings.title: The Gold Standard of Competitive Play
ratings.comment: The best competitive shooter ever made at its peak. Nothing matches the tension of a close match or the satisfaction of a well-executed clutch round. Just be prepared to grind.

ratings.title: Great Game, Terrible Community
ratings.comment: Great gameplay undermined by a toxic community and rampant cheating. The highs are genuinely thrilling but the lows are exhausting. Approach with thick skin and managed expectations.

ratings.title: Hundreds of Hours, Still Learning
ratings.comment: CS:GO defined competitive shooters for a generation. The economy system adds a strategic layer that no other game has replicated. Hundreds of hours later and I'm still learning.

ratings.title: Cheaters Ruined What Could Be Great
ratings.comment: The cheating problem makes ranked play miserable and the learning curve is punishing for newcomers. Other shooters offer the same thrills with far less frustration.

games.description: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive is a competitive tactical shooter in which two teams — terrorists and counter-terrorists — face off in round-based matches. Players purchase weapons between rounds and work to complete objectives such as planting or defusing bombs. Known for its precise gunplay and high skill ceiling, it became one of the most popular esports titles in the world.

games.name: Tomb Raider

requirements_en.minimum:
Minimum:

OS: macOS 10.9.1

Processor: 2.0GHz Intel or greater

Memory: 4GB

Graphics: 512Mb AMD 4850, 512Mb Nvidia 650M, Intel HD4000

Hard Drive: 14GB

Minimum:
  • OS:Windows XP / Windows Vista / Windows 7
  • Processor:1.8 GHz Processor
  • Memory:512 MB RAM
  • Graphics:3D graphics card compatible with DirectX 9
  • DirectX®:9.0
  • Hard Drive:2 GB HD space

ratings.title: A Confident and Exciting Reboot
ratings.comment: A confident and exciting reboot that gives Lara real depth and vulnerability. The island setting is gorgeous and the combat is satisfying. A great action game that surprised me.

ratings.title: Lara's Best Adventure Yet
ratings.comment: One of the best action-adventure games of its generation. Lara's transformation from frightened survivor to capable warrior is handled with genuine care. Visually stunning throughout.

ratings.title: Polished But Playing It Too Safe
ratings.comment: Competent and polished but heavily derivative of Uncharted. The story is predictable and the open areas feel padded. A good game that plays it safe at every turn.

ratings.title: Generic From Beginning to End
ratings.comment: Felt generic from start to finish. The survival premise is quickly abandoned in favor of standard action game tropes. Nothing here you haven't seen done better elsewhere.

games.description: Tomb Raider is an action-adventure game that reimagines the origin of Lara Croft. Shipwrecked on a mysterious island, a young and inexperienced Lara must fight to survive against hostile forces while uncovering dark secrets about the island's past. The game blends exploration, combat, and puzzle-solving in a gritty and cinematic experience.

games.name: Portal

requirements_en.minimum: Minimum: OS X version Leopard 10.5.8, Snow Leopard 10.6.3, 1GB RAM, NVIDIA GeForce 8 or higher, ATI X1600 or higher, or Intel HD 3000 or higher Mouse, Keyboard, Internet Connection

Minimum: 1.7 GHz Processor, 512MB RAM, DirectX® 8.1 level Graphics Card (Requires support for SSE), Windows® 7 (32/64-bit)/Vista/XP, Mouse, Keyboard, Internet Connection

Recommended: Pentium 4 processor (3.0GHz, or better), 1GB RAM, DirectX® 9 level Graphics Card, Windows® 7 (32/64-bit)/Vista/XP, Mouse, Keyboard, Internet Connection

requirements_ru.minimum: Pentium 4/Athlon XP 1.7 ГГц,512 Мб памяти,3D-ускоритель со 128 Мб памяти,7.5 Гб на винчестере,Интернет-соединение 128 Кб/c
requirements_ru.recommended: Core 2 Duo/Athlon 64 3 ГГц,1 Гб памяти,3D-ускоритель с 512 Мб памяти,12 Гб на винчестере,Интернет-соединение 512 Кб/c

requirements_en.minimum: 4.4 and up

ratings.title: One of the Most Original Games Ever Made
ratings.comment: A perfect game in every sense. Clever, funny, short, and endlessly replayable. The portal mechanic is one of the most original ideas in game design history. Essential playing.

ratings.title: Brilliant Concept, Brilliant Execution
ratings.comment: Brilliant concept executed flawlessly. It's over before you know it but leaves a lasting impression. The dark humor and ominous atmosphere make it unlike anything else.

ratings.title: Too Short to Be Truly Satisfying
ratings.comment: Clever for sure, but too short to be truly satisfying. The story barely gets started before it ends and I wanted much more. Feels like a proof of concept rather than a full game.

ratings.title: A Concept Without Enough Substance
ratings.comment: Puzzle games aren't for everyone and this didn't win me over. The concept is interesting but the execution felt cold and mechanical. Portal 2 is the better version of this idea.

games.description: Portal is a first-person puzzle game in which players navigate a series of test chambers using a device that creates interconnected portals on surfaces. Originally released as part of The Orange Box, the game combines clever spatial puzzles with a darkly comedic narrative involving a sinister AI. A short but unforgettable experience that changed how players think about game design.

games.name: Left 4 Dead 2

Minimum:

  • Processor: Pentium 4 3.0GHz
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Video card with 128 MB, Shader model 2.0. ATI X800, NVidia 6600 or better

  • Storage: 13 GB available space

  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Video Card Shader model 3.0. NVidia 7600, ATI X1600 or better
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c

  • Sound Card: DirectX 9.0c compatible sound card

requirements_ru.minimum: Pentium 4/Athlon 64 3 ГГц,1 Гб памяти,GeForce 6600/Radeon X800,7.5 Гб на винчестере
requirements_ru.recommended: Core 2 Duo/Athlon 64 X2 2.4 ГГц,2 Гб памяти,GeForce 7600/Radeon X1600,7.5 Гб на винчестере

ratings.title: Still the Best Co-Op Zombie Game
ratings.comment: Still the best co-op zombie experience out there. The AI Director keeps things tense and unpredictable. Playing with three good friends on Expert difficulty is gaming at its finest.

ratings.title: Teamwork at Its Most Thrilling
ratings.comment: A flawless co-op shooter that has never been matched. The special infected are brilliantly designed to force teamwork and the campaigns are varied and endlessly replayable.

ratings.title: Fun With Friends, Empty Without Them
ratings.comment: Fun in short bursts but gets repetitive quickly without friends to play with. The solo experience is lonely and the AI teammates are unreliable. A game designed around its multiplayer.

ratings.title: Zombie Fatigue Set In Fast
ratings.comment: Zombie fatigue set in fast. The gameplay loop is shallow and without good teammates the experience falls flat. There are better co-op shooters available today.

games.description: Left 4 Dead 2 is a cooperative first-person shooter set during a zombie apocalypse. Four survivors must fight their way through hordes of infected across multiple campaigns, each with unique settings and objectives. The game's AI Director dynamically adjusts enemy spawns and pacing based on player performance, ensuring no two runs feel identical. Best played with friends.

games.name: Red Dead Redemption 2

requirements_en.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 7 - Service Pack 1 (6.1.7601)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5-2500K / AMD FX-6300
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 770 2GB / AMD Radeon R9 280 3GB
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection

  • Sound Card: Direct X Compatible

  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i7-4770K / AMD Ryzen 5 1500X
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 6GB / AMD Radeon RX 480 4GB
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 150 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Direct X Compatible

ratings.title: The Most Immersive World Ever Created
ratings.comment: The most immersive open world ever created. Arthur Morgan is one of gaming's great characters and his story is told with surprising emotional depth. A slow burn that rewards patience enormously.

ratings.title: A Slow Burn That Earns Every Moment
ratings.comment: A breathtaking achievement in world-building and character work. The pace is deliberately slow but the payoff is extraordinary. The ending ranks among the best in gaming history.

ratings.title: Beautiful but Exhaustingly Slow
ratings.comment: Stunning to look at but the slow pace and rigid controls wore me down. It demands a lot of patience and not every player will feel the journey is worth it. A technical marvel with pacing issues.

ratings.title: Too Long and Too Rigid to Enjoy
ratings.comment: Too slow and too long. The controls feel deliberately clunky and the story takes forever to get moving. I admire the craft but couldn't enjoy the experience.

games.description: Red Dead Redemption 2 is an epic Western action-adventure game set in a fictionalized version of the American frontier in 1899. Players control Arthur Morgan, an outlaw navigating the decline of the Wild West as law enforcement closes in on his gang. The game is celebrated for its stunning world, deeply human storytelling, and painstaking attention to historical detail.

games.name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim

requirements_en.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 7/Vista/XP PC (32 or 64 bit)
  • Processor: Dual Core 2.0GHz or equivalent processor
  • Memory: 2GB System RAM
  • Hard Disk Space: 6GB free HDD Space
  • Video Card: Direct X 9.0c compliant video card with 512 MB of RAM
  • Sound: DirectX compatible sound card

requirements_ru.minimum: Core 2 Duo/Athlon X2 2 ГГц,2 Гб памяти,GeForce 8800/Radeon X1900,6 Гб на винчестере
requirements_ru.recommended: Core 2 Quad/Phenom X4 2.5 ГГц,4 Гб памяти,GeForce GTX 260/Radeon HD 4890,6 Гб на винчестере

ratings.title: Freedom in Video Game Form
ratings.comment: Skyrim is freedom in video game form. Hundreds of hours in and I'm still finding new places and stories. No other game has captured the feeling of exploring a living fantasy world quite like this.

ratings.title: A Landmark Open World Adventure
ratings.comment: A landmark RPG that delivers an unmatched sense of adventure and exploration. The main story is average but the world is extraordinary. Best experienced with a few good mods.

ratings.title: Wide as an Ocean, Shallow as a Puddle
ratings.comment: Wide as an ocean, shallow as a puddle. The RPG systems are watered down compared to earlier Elder Scrolls games and the story is forgettable. Fun to explore but lacking real depth.

ratings.title: Overrated and Oversimplified
ratings.comment: Overrated and oversimplified. The combat is clunky, the writing is poor, and the RPG elements are stripped to the bone. If you want a real RPG, look elsewhere.

games.description: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim is an open-world fantasy RPG in which the player takes on the role of the Dragonborn, a hero with the ability to absorb the souls of dragons and wield their power. Set in the frozen northern province of Tamriel, the game offers hundreds of hours of exploration, dungeon crawling, and quest-driven adventure with nearly limitless character customization.

games.name: Half-Life 2

requirements_en.minimum:
Minimum:

OS: Windows 7, Vista, XP

Processor: 1.7 Ghz

Memory: 512 MB RAM

Graphics: DirectX 8.1 level Graphics Card (requires support for SSE)

Storage: 6500 MB available space

requirements_ru.minimum: Pentium III/Athlon 1.2 ГГц,256 Мб памяти,3D-ускоритель с 64 Мб памяти,5 Гб на винчестере,доступ в Интернет
requirements_ru.recommended: Pentium 4/Athlon XP 2.5 ГГц,512 Мб памяти,3D-ускоритель со 128 Мб памяти,5 Гб на винчестере,доступ в Интернет

requirements_en.minimum:
Minimum:

OS: Leopard 10.5.8, Snow Leopard 10.6.3, or higher

Memory: 1 GB RAM

Graphics: Nvidia GeForce8 or higher, ATI X1600 or higher, Intel HD 3000 or higher
4.4 and up

ratings.title: Still Ahead of Its Time
ratings.comment: Half-Life 2 redefined what games could be. The physics, the pacing, the environmental storytelling — everything works in perfect harmony. Two decades later it still feels ahead of its time.

ratings.title: A Masterclass in Game Design
ratings.comment: A masterclass in game design that holds up remarkably well. The gravity gun is one of the most satisfying weapons in shooter history. Essential for anyone serious about the medium.

ratings.title: Important History, Showing Its Age
ratings.comment: Important historically but showing its age in places. The vehicle sections drag and the Ravenholm chapter, while iconic, is more annoying than scary today. Worth playing for context.

ratings.title: A Product of Its Time That Hasn't Aged Well
ratings.comment: Couldn't connect with it. The dated graphics and slow start made it hard to push through. I understand its importance but it's a product of its time that doesn't translate well for new players.

games.description: Half-Life 2 is a first-person shooter in which players return as Gordon Freeman, a scientist fighting against an alien occupation of Earth. Building on the original's legacy, the game introduced advanced physics-based gameplay and environmental storytelling that set a new benchmark for the medium. The gravity gun, the oppressive Combine forces, and the richly detailed world made it an instant classic.

ratings.title: Columbia Left Me Absolutely Speechless
ratings.comment: Columbia is one of the most memorable settings in gaming and the story is a genuine mind-bender. Elizabeth is the best AI companion ever designed. The ending left me speechless.

ratings.title: Spectacular Story, Satisfying Combat
ratings.comment: A visually spectacular game with a genuinely ambitious story. The combat is chaotic fun and the bond between Booker and Elizabeth is beautifully written. A worthy follow-up to the original.

ratings.title: Pretty Ambition, Repetitive Execution
ratings.comment: The setting and story are impressive but the shooting feels repetitive and the ending is more confusing than clever. A game that tries very hard and succeeds about halfway.

ratings.title: Pretentious Story, Mediocre Gameplay
ratings.comment: The story is pretentious and the gameplay is mediocre. The original BioShock was a masterpiece; this feels like a pale imitation dressed up in pretty clothes.

games.description: BioShock Infinite is a first-person shooter set in Columbia, a magnificent city floating in the sky in 1912. Players control Booker DeWitt, sent to rescue a mysterious young woman named Elizabeth who has been imprisoned in the city for years. The game explores themes of American exceptionalism, racism, and time through a mind-bending narrative and fast-paced combat.

games.name: Borderlands 2

requirements_ru.minimum: Core 2 Duo/Athlon 64 X2 2.4 ГГц,2 Гб памяти,GeForce 8500/Radeon HD 2600,13 Гб на винчестере,интернет-соединение
requirements_ru.recommended: Core i5/Phenom X4 2.3 ГГц,2 Гб памяти,GeForce GTX 560/Radeon HD 5850,20 Гб на винчестере,интернет-соединение

ratings.title: Best Co-Op Shooter of Its Generation
ratings.comment: The best co-op shooter of its generation. Handsome Jack is a legendary villain and the loot system is endlessly addictive. Four-player co-op with good friends is an absolute joy.

ratings.title: The Looter-Shooter Formula Perfected
ratings.comment: Borderlands 2 perfected the looter-shooter formula. The humor lands more often than it misses and the character builds allow for real creativity. Sunk hundreds of hours into this.

ratings.title: Fun With Friends, Hollow Alone
ratings.comment: Fun with friends but hollow solo. The humor wears thin quickly and the mission structure is repetitive. A good co-op game dressed up as something deeper than it actually is.

ratings.title: Humor Misses and Gameplay Wears Thin
ratings.comment: The humor is juvenile and the gameplay loop wore me out after a few hours. The loot system creates an illusion of depth that isn't really there. Not my kind of game at all.

games.description: Borderlands 2 is a first-person looter-shooter set on the alien planet of Pandora. Players choose from several vault hunters — each with unique abilities — and battle through a chaotic world filled with procedurally generated weapons and the villainous Handsome Jack. Known for its irreverent humor, addictive loot system, and excellent co-op gameplay for up to four players.

games.name: Life is Strange

requirements_en.minimum: iPhone 5s, iPad Air, iPad Air Cellular, iPad Mini Retina, iPad Mini Retina Cellular, iPhone 6, iPhone 6 Plus, iPad Air 2, iPad Air 2 Cellular, iPad Mini 3, iPad Mini 3 Cellular, iPod Touch Sixth Gen, iPhone 6s, iPhone 6s Plus, iPad Mini 4, iPad Mini 4 Cellular, iPad Pro, iPad Pro Cellular, iPad Pro 9.7, iPad Pro 9.7 Cellular, iPhone SE, iPhone 7, iPhone 7 Plus, iPad 6 1 1, iPad 6 1 2, iPad 7 1, iPad 7 2, iPad 7 3, iPad 7 4, iPhone 8, iPhone 8 Plus, iPhone X, iPad 7 5, iPad 7 6, iPhone X S, iPhone X S Max, iPhone X R, iPad 8 1 2, iPad 8 3 4, iPad 8 5 6, iPad 8 7 8, iPad Mini 5, iPad Mini 5 Cellular, iPad Air 3, iPad Air 3 Cellular, iPod Touch Seventh Gen
6.0 and up

ratings.title: Made Me Feel Things Games Rarely Do
ratings.comment: Life is Strange made me genuinely emotional in ways few games ever have. The time-rewind mechanic is used thoughtfully and Max and Chloe's friendship feels completely real.

ratings.title: A Moving and Original Adventure
ratings.comment: A moving and original adventure game that takes its characters seriously. The mystery is compelling and the soundtrack is perfectly chosen. Episode four in particular is devastating.

ratings.title: Uneven Writing Holds It Back
ratings.comment: The writing is inconsistent and some of the dialogue tries too hard to sound authentic. The story has real emotional moments but also some that fall completely flat. A mixed bag.

ratings.title: Slow Drama That Never Earns Its Ending
ratings.comment: Slow, predictable, and the teenage drama felt forced throughout. The time mechanic is underused and the ending felt unearned. Adventure game fans deserve better than this.

games.description: Life is Strange is an episodic adventure game following Max Caulfield, a photography student who discovers she has the ability to rewind time. Reunited with her childhood friend Chloe in the fictional town of Arcadia Bay, Max uses her powers to unravel a dark mystery surrounding a missing girl. The game is praised for its emotional storytelling and meaningful player choices.

games.name: BioShock

requirements_en.minimum:
Minimum:

  • Operating System: Windows XP (with Service Pack 2) or Windows Vista
  • CPU: Intel single-core Pentium 4 processor at 2.4GHz
  • RAM: 1 GB

  • CPU: Intel Core 2 Duo processor
  • RAM: 2GB
  • Video Card: DX 9 - Direct X 9.0c compliant video card with 512 MB RAM and Pixel Shader 3.0 (NVIDIA GeForce 7900 GT or better), DX 10 - NVIDIA GeForce 8600 or better
  • Sound Card: SoundBlaster(r) X-Fi(tm) series (optimized foruse with Creative Labs EAX ADVANCED HD 4.0 or EAX ADVANCED HD 5.0 compatible sound cards)

requirements_ru.minimum: Pentium 4/Athlon 64 2.5 ГГц,1 Гб памяти,3D-ускоритель со 128 Мб памяти и SM 3.0, 7.5 Гб на винчестере, Windows XP SP2 или Vista,Интернет-соединение
requirements_ru.recommended: Core 2 Duo/Athlon 64 X2 3 ГГц,2 Гб памяти,3D-ускоритель с 512 Мб памяти и SM 3.0, 7.5 Гб на винчестере, Windows Vista,Интернет-соединение

ratings.title: One of Gaming's Greatest Achievements
ratings.comment: BioShock is one of the greatest games ever made. Rapture is an astonishing creation and the story is both thrilling and philosophically rich. The twist remains one of gaming's finest moments.

ratings.title: Dark, Atmospheric, Unforgettable
ratings.comment: A dark, atmospheric masterpiece with one of the most memorable settings in any game. The plasmid system keeps combat fresh and the storytelling through the environment is extraordinary.

ratings.title: Brilliant Start, Tedious Finish
ratings.comment: Great atmosphere and story let down by repetitive combat in the back half. Once the twist lands the game struggles to maintain its momentum. Brilliant in places, tedious in others.

ratings.title: Overpraised and Overrated
ratings.comment: The atmosphere is suffocating in a bad way and the combat is clunky and unenjoyable. The story is good but not enough to carry the experience. Overpraised by far.

games.description: BioShock is a first-person shooter set in Rapture, a dystopian underwater city built on the philosophy of objectivism that has collapsed into chaos. Players must fight through the decaying city using conventional weapons and plasmids — genetic modifications that grant supernatural powers. Widely regarded as one of the greatest games ever made for its atmosphere, story, and design.

games.name: Destiny 2

ratings.title: Nothing Matches a Great Raid Night
ratings.comment: When Destiny 2 is at its best — a well-designed raid with a great fireteam — there's nothing quite like it. The gunplay is exceptional and the lore runs incredibly deep for those willing to dig.

ratings.title: Great Gameplay, Predatory Model
ratings.comment: The gameplay is silky smooth but the live-service model creates a grind that feels more like a job than fun. Content vaulting removes work you've already paid for. Frustrating business practices.

ratings.title: The Best-Feeling Shooter Available
ratings.comment: The best-feeling shooter available, full stop. The raids are spectacular co-op experiences and the universe is fascinating. Has its flaws but nothing else scratches the same itch.

ratings.title: Designed to Extract Money, Not Fun
ratings.comment: A game designed to extract money rather than deliver fun. The content model is predatory and the story has been told in the most convoluted way imaginable. Pass entirely.

games.description: Destiny 2 is a free-to-play online multiplayer first-person shooter set in a science-fantasy universe. Players create a Guardian — a soldier empowered by a mysterious entity called the Traveler — and defend humanity against alien threats across the solar system. The game features story campaigns, cooperative raids, and competitive PvP modes, with regular seasonal content updates.

games.name: God of War (2018)

requirements_en.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
  • Processor: Intel i5-2500k (4 core 3.3 GHz) or AMD Ryzen 3 1200 (4 core 3.1 GHz)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 960 (4 GB) or AMD R9 290X (4 GB)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 70 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: DirectX feature level 11_1 required
requirements_en.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
  • Processor: Intel i5-6600k (4 core 3.5 GHz) or AMD Ryzen 5 2400 G (4 core 3.6 GHz)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1060 (6 GB) or AMD RX 570 (4 GB)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 70 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: DirectX feature level 11_1 required

ratings.title: A Masterpiece of Character and Combat
ratings.comment: A masterpiece of character-driven action gaming. Kratos and Atreus share one of the most compelling relationships in any medium. The combat is deeply satisfying and the world is breathtaking.

ratings.title: A Brilliant Reinvention of a Legend
ratings.comment: God of War reinvented itself brilliantly. The single-shot camera creates an intimacy that draws you into every moment. A genuinely emotional story wrapped in excellent combat.

ratings.title: Beautiful But Unevenly Paced
ratings.comment: Beautiful and well-made but I found the pacing uneven and Atreus irritating at times. The combat depth is there but the story takes too long to reach its peaks.

ratings.title: Overhyped Mythology Dressed as Depth
ratings.comment: Overhyped and overlong. The combat is shallow once you get past the spectacle and the story is a series of fetch quests dressed up as mythology. Not the reinvention it claims to be.

games.description: God of War is an action-adventure game that reinvents the series with a more intimate, narrative-driven approach. Kratos, the former Greek god of war, now lives in the Norse realm with his young son Atreus. Together they embark on a perilous journey to fulfill a dying wish, confronting gods, monsters, and their complicated relationship along the way.

games.name: Fallout 4

requirements_en.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 7/8/10 (64-bit OS required)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2300 2.8 GHz/AMD Phenom II X4 945 3.0 GHz or equivalent
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 550 Ti 2GB/AMD Radeon HD 7870 2GB or equivalent
  • Storage: 30 GB available space
requirements_en.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 7/8/10 (64-bit OS required)
  • Processor: Intel Core i7 4790 3.6 GHz/AMD FX-9590 4.7 GHz or equivalent
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 780 3GB/AMD Radeon R9 290X 4GB or equivalent
  • Storage: 30 GB available space

ratings.title: A Great Game, A Disappointing Fallout
ratings.comment: A great open-world game even if it's a disappointing RPG. The gunplay is the best in the series and the settlement building is genuinely addictive. Explore everything and ignore the main quest.

ratings.title: Beautiful World, Missing Its Soul
ratings.comment: Fun to play but hollow compared to its predecessors. The dialogue system strips away real choice and the factions lack the moral ambiguity that made Fallout great. A beautiful game without a soul.

ratings.title: Gets Unfair Criticism From Purists
ratings.comment: Fallout 4 gets unfair criticism. The world is rich, the combat is exciting, and the survival mode adds genuine tension. Not the RPG purists wanted but a great game on its own terms.

ratings.title: A Betrayal of Everything Fallout Stands For
ratings.comment: A betrayal of what Fallout stands for. The dialogue options are meaningless, the story is insulting in its simplicity, and the RPG depth has been gutted entirely. New Vegas did everything better.

games.description: Fallout 4 is a post-apocalyptic action RPG set in the ruins of Boston, Massachusetts in the year 2287. Players emerge from a vault 210 years after a nuclear war to search for their missing son in a world populated by mutants, raiders, and warring factions. The game features base-building mechanics, deep crafting systems, and a vast open world to explore.

  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 10

ratings.title: Dark, Beautiful, and Quietly Affecting
ratings.comment: Limbo is a beautiful and unsettling experience that proves games can be art. The monochromatic world is stunning and the puzzle design is creative without being frustrating. A gem.

ratings.title: One of the Most Striking Games Ever Made
ratings.comment: One of the most visually striking and atmospherically perfect games ever made. Short but deeply affecting. The silence, the shadows, and the helplessness of the boy stay with you.

ratings.title: All Style, Not Enough Substance
ratings.comment: Atmospheric but thin on substance. The puzzles are hit or miss and the story is so minimal it borders on pretentious. Pretty to look at but I wanted more from the experience.

ratings.title: Style Over Substance, Nothing More
ratings.comment: Style over substance. The game leans entirely on its visual identity and the puzzles don't hold up. Short, frustrating in the wrong ways, and ultimately forgettable despite the aesthetic.

games.description: Limbo is a dark, atmospheric puzzle-platformer in which a young boy journeys through a monochromatic world searching for his sister. The game uses stark black and white visuals and environmental storytelling to create a haunting, wordless narrative. Its puzzles are clever and often deadly, with trial-and-error deaths that feel more poetic than frustrating. A landmark of indie game artistry.

games.name: PAYDAY 2

requirements_en.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS:Windows 7
  • Processor:2 GHz Intel Dual Core Processor
  • Memory:4 GB RAM
  • Graphics:Nvidia & AMD (512MB VRAM)
  • DirectX®:9.0c
  • Hard Drive:31 GB HD space
  • Sound:DirectX 9.0c compatible
requirements_en.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS:Windows 10
  • Processor:2.3 GHz Intel Quad Core Processor
  • Memory:8 GB RAM
  • Graphics:Nvidia & AMD (1GB VRAM)
  • DirectX®:9.0c
  • Hard Drive:45 GB HD space
  • Sound:DirectX 9.0c compatible

ratings.title: Chaos and Satisfaction in Equal Measure
ratings.comment: PAYDAY 2 with a good crew is endlessly entertaining. The heist variety is impressive and the feeling of a clean stealth run is deeply satisfying. A chaotic blast when everyone knows their role.

ratings.title: Fun Concept Buried in Rough Design
ratings.comment: Fun in concept but rough in execution. The learning curve is brutal, the DLC situation is predatory, and solo play is a miserable experience. Has its moments but asks too much of new players.

ratings.title: The Deepest Heist Game Ever Made
ratings.comment: The deepest and most replayable heist game ever made. The sheer variety of approaches, builds, and missions keeps things fresh for hundreds of hours. Nothing else quite like it.

ratings.title: DLC Greed Ruined What Could Have Been
ratings.comment: Years of DLC abuse have left this game in a terrible state for newcomers. The base experience is shallow and the community is unforgiving. Not worth the investment of time or money.

games.description: PAYDAY 2 is a cooperative first-person shooter focused on planning and executing heists. Players take on the roles of career criminals completing jobs ranging from bank robberies to drug lab raids, with options to go in loud or attempt a stealthy approach. The game features deep progression systems, extensive weapon customization, and a vast library of heist missions.

requirements_ru.minimum: Pentium 4/Athlon XP 1.7 ГГц,512 Мб памяти,3D-ускоритель со 128 Мб памяти,7.5 Гб на винчестере,Интернет-соединение 128 Кб/c

ratings.title: A Classic That Has Stood the Test of Time
ratings.comment: TF2 is a classic for good reason. Nine perfectly balanced classes, maps that have stood the test of time, and a community still creating content after all these years. A legendary multiplayer game.

ratings.title: Great Bones Undermined by Neglect
ratings.comment: The bot infestation in recent years has seriously damaged the experience. At its peak it was untouchable, but finding a clean server today is frustrating. The bones are still great though.

ratings.title: The Greatest Class-Based Shooter Ever
ratings.comment: The greatest class-based shooter ever made. Every class is a masterpiece of design and the game has more personality in one map than most games have in their entire runtime. Timeless.

ratings.title: Abandoned by Valve, Overrun by Bots
ratings.comment: Overrun with bots and ignored by Valve for years. What was once a great game is now a frustrating mess that new players have no reason to wade through when better options exist.

games.description: Team Fortress 2 is a team-based multiplayer first-person shooter featuring nine distinct classes, each with a unique role and playstyle. Two teams compete across a variety of game modes including capture the flag, payload, and king of the hill. Known for its colorful art style, deep mechanical skillplay, and vibrant community, it remains free to play and actively enjoyed years after launch.
